revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required: (1) QUOTE PRECISION: Two quotes are truncated (00:36 omits 'I have a specialist who can meet with you and help you explore your options'; 01:33 close omits the value statement that follows). Revise to use full verbatim quotes from the transcript. (2) SCHEMA ENGAGEMENT GAPS: cherry_pick_moments[0] (00:36 reactive read) must engage with the schema's explicit short-call compression provision (call_shape note on calls under 6 min with existing records) before dismissing the strategic hypothesis — the reactive verdict can stand but the dismissal must be schema-grounded. cherry_pick_moments[2] bill_anchor classification label should be revised to reflect absence of the beat, not mishandling of it. (3) MISSED MOMENTS: Add three missed moments — (a) Brandon's active-listening failure at 01:14-01:18 where he misheard 'anything except Thursday' as 'Thursday works best' and required customer correction; (b) the gatekeeper/screening system at 00:00 as context for why Brian's warmth at 00:27 is a stronger positive signal than a cold pickup; (c) a positive cherry-pick crediting Brandon for staying in setter scope on the close (01:33-01:41). Additionally, revise coaching_focus[0].why to hedge 'no-showed' to 'missed or rescheduled a prior appointment' since the transcript is ambiguous on cause, and revise the outcome_dispute framing to be conditional ('if tagged as clean appointment_booked') rather than disputing an acknowledged-unknown tag.
